# Design Portfolio - Copilot Instructions

This is a React + TypeScript + Vite portfolio showcasing UI/UX and product design work.

## Project Setup
- Framework: React 18 with TypeScript
- Build tool: Vite
- Styling: CSS Modules + Tailwind CSS
- Node version: v20.11.1+

## Project Structure
```
src/
  ├── components/        # Reusable UI components
  ├── pages/            # Page components
  ├── assets/           # Images, icons, PDFs
  ├── styles/           # Global styles
  └── App.tsx           # Main app component
```

## Development
- `npm run dev` - Start dev server (port 5173)
- `npm run build` - Production build
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Design Sections
- **Hero**: Eye-catching landing section
- **Featured Projects**: Showcase 3-5 best case studies
- **Skills**: UI/UX and product design capabilities
- **Contact**: Email and social links

## Styling Notes
- Use CSS Modules for component-scoped styles
- Tailwind for utility classes and responsive design
- Focus on clean, modern aesthetic for designer portfolio
- Ensure accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA)
